generators.description: Pull out the leather logbook and sketch what just surfaced off the bow. Tap to gain 1 Sailor's Tale. A Cabin Boy will take over the sketches at 10 owned.

upgrades.name: India Ink Reserves
upgrades.description: Better ink means a sketch survives the salt spray.

upgrades.name: Steady Hand at Sea
upgrades.description: The cabin boy braces against the swell — neater lines, more detail.

upgrades.name: Letter-of-Marque Network
upgrades.description: Privateers carry your sketches between every major harbor.

generators.description: Write up the voyage for the tavern crowd. Pay a Tavern Bard to read it aloud each night.

upgrades.name: Translated to French and Dutch
upgrades.description: The story crosses borders by morning.

upgrades.name: Itinerant Storytellers
upgrades.description: Wandering bards carry the captain's tale inland.

upgrades.name: Hanseatic League Booths
upgrades.description: Every dockside fair from Bergen to Lisbon retells the tale.

generators.description: Commission a copper-plate of the monster. Image is argument; pictures sell what words can't.

upgrades.name: Engraver's Apprentices
upgrades.description: Three carvers per plate; ten plates a week.

upgrades.name: Hand-Tinted Plates
upgrades.description: A green-scaled kraken sells twice as well as a black-ink one.

upgrades.name: Cartographer's Endorsement
upgrades.description: The beast is now on the official sea-chart, right next to the depth lines.

generators.description: A heart-rending letter from the only man to come back from the voyage. The Forger fills in the names.

upgrades.name: Admiralty Wax-Seal
upgrades.description: A passable copy of the Admiralty's privy seal, ready by tide.

upgrades.name: Naval Chancery Hand
upgrades.description: Three former clerks teach the forgers the exact official script.

upgrades.name: Beyond the Inspectors
upgrades.description: Even the king's philologists cannot tell the survivor's letter from the real thing.

generators.description: A respectable royal-society treatise classifies every monster — invented and otherwise — as a confirmed species.

upgrades.name: Royal Society Imprimatur
upgrades.description: Official scientific approval turns a sailor's yarn into Linnaean fact.

upgrades.name: Folio of Color Plates
upgrades.description: Each species drawn in glorious detail — three times the subscriber list.

upgrades.name: Standing Naturalist Commission
upgrades.description: A permanent academic body to classify, print, and never quite retract.

generators.description: Weekly periodical of the world's strangest sailor's tales. By subscription, post-paid.

upgrades.name: Stereotype Plates
upgrades.description: Mould the type once; run it forever. No resetting between issues.

upgrades.name: Weekly Issue Cadence
upgrades.description: Readers wait for it now. A standing audience is a multiplier.

upgrades.name: Lloyd's Coffee-House Distribution
upgrades.description: Every shipping insurer in London reads the gazette before they price a hull.

prestige_bridge_copy: Steam arrives. The sails come down, the cameras come out, and the monsters move ashore. Sailors retire to lakeside taverns. The lake has a monster of its own.
